MuE decomposes the image and text modalities in the encoder, allowing it to skip different layers in terms of modalities for improved inference efficiency while minimizing performance drop.
Experiments on SNLI-VE and MS COCO datasets show that MuE can reduce expected inference time by up to 50% and 40% while maintaining 99% and 96% performance respectively.
